name: cherrystone/verticals-showcase
title: Verticals Showcase
description: Interactive card-grid showcase highlighting investment sectors.

lede.default: We invest where our members have built, sold, or operated. Sourced, screened, and backed by experienced operators.

default.desc: Therapeutics, diagnostics, agricultural tech, and aquafeed innovation. Direct support from former Pfizer VPs and biotech founders.
Natural language processing, generative AI, enterprise workflows, and immersive collaboration tools. Sourced and scaled by tech executives.
DTC consumer products, food & beverage scaleups, and early educational devices. Leveraging Rhode Island operating experience.
Nanotechnology, building intelligence, autonomous undersea vehicles, and smart logistics. Led by hardware scale experts.
Digital health platforms, clinical workflow systems, and remote maternal support. Backed by medical device executives.
Earned-wage access systems, secure digital banking for hourly workers, and local transaction engines. Supported by veteran finance directors.
